question: 2001 census se un bade rural households ko dhoondo jinke paanch se zyada members hain, unke IDs aur total member counts ko descending order mein list karo.
sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T1.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_PERSON_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T3 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T2.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T1.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT HAVING SUM(T1.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT) > 5 ORDER BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT DESC

question: State aur urban/rural status ke hisaab se breakdown do, jismein average household size aur total recorded households dikhao.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE, T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG, AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT), COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE, T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG

question: 2001 Census ke mutabik, har state mein urban aur rural areas ke hisaab se average household size aur total households ka breakdown do.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE, T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG, AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT), COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE, T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG ORDER BY T1.STATE ASC

question: Sabhi urban households ko identify karo jinke teen se zyada bachche hain jo 14 saal ya usse kam umar ke hain.
sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban' AND T1.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT > 3

question: Shehri parivaar jo 0 se 14 saal ke beech teen se zyada bacche rakhte hain, unhe identify karo.
sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban' GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID HAVING SUM(T1.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT) > 3

question: Har state ke andar districts ko ranking karo, average bachon ki sankhya (0 se 14 saal) per household ke hisaab se, highest se lowest tak.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT, AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT ORDER BY AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT) DESC

question: Konsa das gaon ilaake hain jahan average ghar ka size sabse zyada hai?
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT, AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT ORDER BY AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT) DESC LIMIT 10

question: Top 10 rural districts batao jahan average household size sabse zyada ho.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT, AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT ORDER BY AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT) DESC LIMIT 10

question: Top 10 rural districts ko identify karo jinka average household member count sabse zyada hai, khaas taur par unka jo second neighborhood category mein aate hain.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT, AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' AND T1.PSU_VILLAGE_OR_NEIGHBORHOOD_CODE = '2' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT ORDER BY AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT) DESC LIMIT 10

question: State-wise breakdown do, urban areas mein rehne wale total household members aur married women ki sankhya ka.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE, SUM(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT), SUM(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_WOMEN_COUNT) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban' GROUP BY T1.STATE

question: State-wise breakdown do jo total household members aur married women urban areas mein rehte hain, sirf un states ke liye jahan household members five se zyada hain, aur results ko married women ki highest count ke hisaab se sort karo.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE, SUM(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT), SUM(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_WOMEN_COUNT) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_PERSON_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban' GROUP BY T1.STATE HAVING SUM(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT) > 5 ORDER BY SUM(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_WOMEN_COUNT) DESC

question: 2001 census ke hisaab se, woh states bataye jo poori tarah rural areas se bane hain.
sql: SELECT STATE FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY WHERE CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG IN ('Rural', 'Urban') GROUP BY STATE HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0

question: Household composition data ke hisaab se, kaun se states pure tarah rural areas se bane hain?
sql: SELECT T1.STATE FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0

question: Konsi states aisi hain jo sirf rural areas se bani hain aur jahan par household composition ka data record kiya gaya hai?
sql: SELECT T1.STATE FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.STATE HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T1.DISTRICT) > 0 AND T1.STATE NOT IN (SELECT STATE FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY WHERE CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban')

question: Un households ke geography IDs pata karo jo kam se kam teen youths, umar 15 se 21 ke beech, rakhte hain aur ek re-interview survey ka hissa rahe hain.
sql: SELECT T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T1 JOIN DIM_SURVEY_METHODOLOGY AS T2 ON T1.SURVEY_METHODOLOGY_ID = T2.SURVEY_METHODOLOGY_ID WHERE T1.HOUSEHOLD_YOUTH_15_TO_21_COUNT >= 3 AND T2.IS_REINTERVIEW_HOUSEHOLD = 'Yes';

question: Geographic areas ke IDs pata karo jahan kam se kam ek aisa ghar ho jo re-interview hua ho aur jisme teen ya usse zyada yuva hon, umar 15 se 21 ke beech, aur results ko numerically sort karo.
sql: SELECT T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_SURVEY_METHODOLOGY AS T3 ON T2.SURVEY_METHODOLOGY_ID = T3.SURVEY_METHODOLOGY_ID WHERE T2.HOUSEHOLD_YOUTH_15_TO_21_COUNT >= 3 AND T3.IS_REINTERVIEW_HOUSEHOLD = 'Yes' GROUP BY T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID HAVING COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) > 0 ORDER BY T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID ASC

question: States aur districts dhundho jo ya toh urban category mein aate hain, ya phir unmein aise households hain jahan 15 se 21 saal ke 3 se zyada members rehte hain.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.HOUSEHOLD_YOUTH_15_TO_21_COUNT > 3 OR T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban'

question: States aur districts pehchano jo ya toh urban areas mein aate hain ya phir unmein teen se zyada young residents wale households hain, jinki umar 15 se 21 ke beech hai.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.HOUSEHOLD_YOUTH_15_TO_21_COUNT > 3 OR T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban'

question: Uttar Pradesh ke rural Dalit households ke liye household IDs aur asset indices provide karo.
sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T2.HOUSEHOLD_ASSETS_INDEX FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T1 JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIOECONOMIC AS T2 ON T1.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID = T2.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T3.STATE = 'Uttar Pradesh' AND T3.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' AND T2.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY = 'Dalit'

question: Uttar Pradesh ke rural areas mein jo Dalit households hain, unke household IDs aur unke corresponding asset indices ko list karo, asset index ke hisaab se order karke.
sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T2.HOUSEHOLD_ASSETS_INDEX FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T1 JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIOECONOMIC AS T2 ON T1.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID = T2.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T3.STATE = 'Uttar Pradesh' AND T3.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' AND T2.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY = 'Dalit' ORDER BY T2.HOUSEHOLD_ASSETS_INDEX

question: Religious ya caste groups ke hisaab se, urban-rural status aur state ke basis par, average household size aur average number of married women per household ka breakdown provide karo.
sql: SELECT AVG(T1.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT), AVG(T1.HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_WOMEN_COUNT), T2.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY, T3.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG, T3.STATE FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T1 JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIOECONOMIC AS T2 ON T1.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID = T2.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID GROUP BY T2.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY, T3.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG, T3.STATE

question: Sabhi rural households ko identify karo jinke paas teen se zyada bacche hain jo 14 saal ya usse chhote hain.
sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' AND T1.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT > 3

question: Sabhi rural households ko identify karo jo teen se zyada children aged 14 ya younger rakhte hain, unko ascending order mein apne ID ke basis par list karo.
sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_PERSON_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T3 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T2.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID HAVING SUM(T1.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT) > 3 ORDER BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID ASC

question: States ko ranking karo average number of children aged 0 to 14 per household ke basis par, highest se lowest.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE, AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE ORDER BY AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT) DESC

question: States ko ranking karo average number of children aged 0 to 14 per household ke basis par, sirf un states ko include karte hue jahan ek se zyada recorded households hain.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE, AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE HAVING COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) > 1 ORDER BY AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT) DESC

question: Uttar Pradesh ke rural areas mein top 5 districts batayein jahan average household size sabse zyada ho.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT, AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Uttar Pradesh' AND T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT ORDER BY AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT) DESC LIMIT 5

question: Uttar Pradesh ke top 5 rural districts pata karo jahan average household size sabse zyada hai, sirf un districts ko consider karte hue jahan ek se zyada recorded households hain.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT, AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 INNER JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIOECONOMIC AS T3 ON T2.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID = T3.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Uttar Pradesh' AND T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT HAVING COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) > 1 ORDER BY AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT) DESC LIMIT 5

question: Sabse zyada asset index category wale households ke liye, har state ka average members ka count aur married women ka total count provide karo.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE, AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT), SUM(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_WOMEN_COUNT) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIOECONOMIC AS T3 ON T2.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID = T3.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID WHERE T3.HOUSEHOLD_ASSETS_INDEX = '15' GROUP BY T1.STATE

question: 15th asset index category ke households ke liye, state-wise average members aur total married women ki count batao, group aur order by state karke.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE, AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT), SUM(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_WOMEN_COUNT) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIOECONOMIC AS T3 ON T2.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID = T3.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID WHERE T3.HOUSEHOLD_ASSETS_INDEX = '15' GROUP BY T1.STATE ORDER BY T1.STATE

question: Jin states mein jahan average household size paanch members se zyada hai, un states ko total married women ki sankhya ke hisaab se rank karo, khaas taur par 15th asset index bracket ke households par dhyan dekar.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE, AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT), SUM(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_WOMEN_COUNT) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIOECONOMIC AS T3 ON T2.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID = T3.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID WHERE T3.HOUSEHOLD_ASSETS_INDEX = '15' GROUP BY T1.STATE HAVING AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT) > 5 ORDER BY SUM(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_WOMEN_COUNT) DESC

question: Rajasthan ke kaun se districts mein aisi koi households nahi hain jo Dalit caste group se belong karte hain, unmein se jinka household assets index 15 hai?
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIOECONOMIC AS T3 ON T2.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID = T3.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Rajasthan' AND T3.HOUSEHOLD_ASSETS_INDEX = '15' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN T3.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY = 'Dalit' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0

question: Rajasthan ke districts mein, household asset index 21 wale, Dalit category ke households nahi hai, kaunse districts hain?
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIOECONOMIC AS T3 ON T2.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID = T3.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Rajasthan' AND T3.HOUSEHOLD_ASSETS_INDEX = '21' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN T3.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY = 'Dalit' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0

question: Konsi states mein aisa kam se kam ek district hai jahan Dalit communities ke liye recorded household data available hai?
sql: SELECT T1.STATE FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIOECONOMIC AS T3 ON T2.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID = T3.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID WHERE T3.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY = 'Dalit' GROUP BY T1.STATE HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T1.DISTRICT) >= 1

question: States list karo jismein Dalit households 15th asset index mein categorized hain, alphabetically sorted.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIOECONOMIC AS T3 ON T2.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID = T3.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID WHERE T3.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY = 'Dalit' AND T3.HOUSEHOLD_ASSETS_INDEX = '15' GROUP BY T1.STATE ORDER BY T1.STATE ASC

question: Konsi states mein aisa hai ki kam se kam ek district mein Dalit households hain aur saath hi wahan asset index 15 wale households bhi report kiye gaye hain?
sql: SELECT T1.STATE FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIOECONOMIC AS T3 ON T2.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID = T3.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID WHERE T3.HOUSEHOLD_ASSETS_INDEX = '15' GROUP BY T1.STATE INTERSECT SELECT T1.STATE FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIOECONOMIC AS T3 ON T2.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID = T3.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID WHERE T3.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY = 'Dalit' GROUP BY T1.STATE HAVING COUNT(DISTRICT) >= 1 ORDER BY STATE ASC

question: States aur districts identify karo jismein households Brahmin group ke hain ya phir household assets index par 21 rank rakhte hain.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIOECONOMIC AS T3 ON T2.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID = T3.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID WHERE T3.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY = 'Brahmin' OR T3.HOUSEHOLD_ASSETS_INDEX = '21'

question: Batao kaunse states aur districts mein aise households hain jo ya toh Brahmin group ke hain ya phir household assets index par 21 rank rakhte hain, state ke naam ke hisaab se alphabetical order mein sort karke.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIOECONOMIC AS T3 ON T2.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID = T3.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID WHERE T3.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY = 'Brahmin' OR T3.HOUSEHOLD_ASSETS_INDEX = '21' ORDER BY T1.STATE ASC

question: States aur districts identify karo jo kam se kam ek aise ghar ko include karte hain jo Brahmin group se belong karta hai ya phir household assets index mein 21 rank par hai, alphabetically state ke hisaab se sort karke.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIOECONOMIC AS T3 ON T2.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID = T3.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID WHERE T3.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY = 'Brahmin' OR T3.HOUSEHOLD_ASSETS_INDEX = '21' GROUP BY T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT HAVING COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.STATE ASC

question: Rajasthan ke rural households mein, jinke paas do se zyada married women hain, unke household IDs aur unke corresponding village ya neighborhood codes identify karo.
sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T2.PSU_VILLAGE_OR_NEIGHBORHOOD_CODE FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.STATE = 'Rajasthan' AND T2.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' AND T1.HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_WOMEN_COUNT > 2

question: Himachal Pradesh ke rural households ko identify karo jismein do se zyada married women hain, unka household ID aur local neighborhood ya village code provide karte hue.
sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T2.PSU_VILLAGE_OR_NEIGHBORHOOD_CODE FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.STATE = 'Himachal Pradesh' AND T2.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T2.PSU_VILLAGE_OR_NEIGHBORHOOD_CODE HAVING SUM(T1.HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_WOMEN_COUNT) > 2 ORDER BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID

question: State aur urban/rural status ke hisaab se breakdown do, jismein average number of married women aur total number of children aged 0 to 14 per household dikhayein.
sql: SELECT AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_WOMEN_COUNT), SUM(T2.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT), T1.STATE, T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE, T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG

question: Har ek state ke liye, urban aur rural areas mein breakdown do: average number of married women aur total children under 15 per household.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE, T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG, AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_WOMEN_COUNT), SUM(T2.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE, T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG ORDER BY T1.STATE

question: State aur urban/rural status ke hisaab se breakdown do, jismein average number of married women aur total children under 15 per household dikhao. Sirf un areas par focus karo jahan households mein average ek se zyada married women hain, aur results ko highest child population ke basis pe rank karo.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE, T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG, AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_WOMEN_COUNT), SUM(T2.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE, T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG HAVING AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_WOMEN_COUNT) > 1 ORDER BY SUM(T2.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT) DESC

question: Urban households ko identify karo jinke teen se zyada bachche hain, aur unki umar 14 saal ya usse kam ho.
sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban' AND T1.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT > 3

question: Rural districts ko ranking karo average married women per household ke basis par, sirf unhi districts ko include karte hue jinke paas ek se zyada household records hon.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT, AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_WOMEN_COUNT) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT HAVING COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) > 1 ORDER BY AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_WOMEN_COUNT) DESC

question: Top paanch rural districts dhundho jahan har ghar mein average married women ki sankhya sabse zyada hai.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT, AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_WOMEN_COUNT) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT ORDER BY AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_WOMEN_COUNT) DESC LIMIT 5

question: Top 5 rural districts batao jahan average married women per household sabse zyada ho.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT, AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_WOMEN_COUNT) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT ORDER BY AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_WOMEN_COUNT) DESC LIMIT 5

question: Top 5 rural districts find karo jahan average married women per household sabse zyada ho, sirf unhi districts ke liye jahan ek se zyada household records available hon.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT, AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_WOMEN_COUNT) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT HAVING COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) > 1 ORDER BY AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_WOMEN_COUNT) DESC LIMIT 5

question: 2001 census ke data se, urban areas mein rehne wali shaadi-shuda women aur 0 se 14 saal ke bachchon ka total count calculate karo.
sql: SELECT SUM(FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION.HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_WOMEN_COUNT), SUM(FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT) FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY ON FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION.GEOGRAPHY_ID = DIM_GEOGRAPHY.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE DIM_GEOGRAPHY.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban'

question: Har district ke liye, urban households mein rehne wali total shadi-shuda women aur 0 se 14 saal ke bachchon ki sankhya ka breakdown do, district ke naam ke hisaab se alphabetical order mein sort karke.
sql: SELECT SUM(T1.HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_WOMEN_COUNT), SUM(T1.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT) FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban' GROUP BY T2.DISTRICT ORDER BY T2.DISTRICT

question: Urban areas mein, ek se zyada recorded households wale regions ke liye, married women aur 0 to 14 age ke children ki total count provide karo.
sql: SELECT SUM(T1.HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_WOMEN_COUNT), SUM(T1.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT), T2.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID INNER JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T3 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T2.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban' GROUP BY T2.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG HAVING COUNT(T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID) > 1 ORDER BY SUM(T1.HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_WOMEN_COUNT) DESC

question: Survey mein re-interview ke liye koi bhi households select nahi kiye gaye urban districts identify karo.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_SURVEY_METHODOLOGY AS T3 ON T2.SURVEY_METHODOLOGY_ID = T3.SURVEY_METHODOLOGY_ID WHERE T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN T3.IS_REINTERVIEW_HOUSEHOLD = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0

question: Shehron ke woh ilaake dhundho jahan survey ke dauran kisi bhi ghar ko re-interview ke liye nahin chuna gaya.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_SURVEY_METHODOLOGY AS T3 ON T2.SURVEY_METHODOLOGY_ID = T3.SURVEY_METHODOLOGY_ID WHERE T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN T3.IS_REINTERVIEW_HOUSEHOLD = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0

question: Sabhi urban districts ko identify karo jahan re-interviews ke zariye koi bhi household surveys nahi kiye gaye, aur unhe alphabetical order mein list karo.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_SURVEY_METHODOLOGY AS T3 ON T2.SURVEY_METHODOLOGY_ID = T3.SURVEY_METHODOLOGY_ID WHERE T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN T3.IS_REINTERVIEW_HOUSEHOLD = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 ORDER BY T1.DISTRICT ASC

question: Shehri ilakon ko chhanto jahan kam se kam ek aisa ghar ho jisme ek shadi-shuda aurat ho.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban' AND T2.HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_WOMEN_COUNT >= 1 GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG) > 0

question: Urban districts ke names, alphabetical order mein list karo, jinme kam se kam ek aisa ghar ho jahan ek shadi-shuda mahila rehti ho.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban' AND T2.HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_WOMEN_COUNT >= 1 GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG) > 0 ORDER BY T1.DISTRICT

question: Himachal Pradesh mein kaunse districts aise hain jahan urban aur rural dono areas mein kam se kam ek ghar aisa ho jismein married women hon? Unhe alphabetical order mein list karo.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Himachal Pradesh' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban' AND T2.HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_WOMEN_COUNT >= 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' AND T2.HOUSEHOLD_MARRIED_WOMEN_COUNT >= 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 ORDER BY T1.DISTRICT ASC

question: Sare districts ko identify karo jo urban areas mein classified hai ya fir household re-interviews conduct kiye hain.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_SURVEY_METHODOLOGY AS T3 ON T2.SURVEY_METHODOLOGY_ID = T3.SURVEY_METHODOLOGY_ID WHERE T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban' OR T3.IS_REINTERVIEW_HOUSEHOLD = 'Yes'

question: Urban ya re-interview surveys mein shamil households wale districts ki ek alphabetized list provide karo.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_SURVEY_METHODOLOGY AS T3 ON T2.SURVEY_METHODOLOGY_ID = T3.SURVEY_METHODOLOGY_ID WHERE T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban' OR T3.IS_REINTERVIEW_HOUSEHOLD = 'Yes' ORDER BY T1.DISTRICT

question: Urban districts ya fir jisme re-interviewed households ho, unke names alphabetically sort karke list karo.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_SURVEY_METHODOLOGY AS T3 ON T2.SURVEY_METHODOLOGY_ID = T3.SURVEY_METHODOLOGY_ID WHERE T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban' OR T3.IS_REINTERVIEW_HOUSEHOLD = 'Yes' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT HAVING COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.DISTRICT ASC

question: Rural Uttar Pradesh mein, poverty line ke upar wale households ke IDs identify karo.
sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T3 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T2.STATE = 'Uttar Pradesh' AND T2.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' AND T3.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No'

question: Poverty line se upar wale households ke liye, state aur urban-rural classification ke hisaab se, average monthly per capita consumption aur total household count provide karo.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE, T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG, AVG(T3.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA), COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T3.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No' GROUP BY T1.STATE, T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG

question: State-wise breakdown do, average monthly per capita consumption aur total households ka, un families ke liye jo poverty line se upar rehte hain, categorized by their 2001 urban ya rural status ke hisaab se.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE, T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG, AVG(T3.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA), COUNT(T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T3.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No' GROUP BY T1.STATE, T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG ORDER BY T1.STATE ASC

question: Alag-alag states aur urban/rural areas mein sirf poverty line se upar waale households ka average monthly per capita consumption aur total household count compare karo.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE, T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG, AVG(T2.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA), COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 INNER JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID INNER JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T2 ON T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T2.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No' GROUP BY T1.STATE, T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG HAVING COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) > 0 ORDER BY AVG(T2.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA) DESC

question: Sare rural households ke liye, jo abhi poverty line se upar reh rahe hain, unke household IDs batayein.
sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' AND T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID IN (SELECT HOUSEHOLD_ID FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS WHERE BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No');

question: Rural households ke IDs batayein jo abhi poverty line se upar reh rahe hain.
sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T3 ON T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' AND T1.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No';

question: States ko unke average monthly per capita consumption ke hisaab se rank karo, lekin sirf un households ke liye jo poverty line se upar hain.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE, AVG(T3.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T3.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No' GROUP BY T1.STATE ORDER BY AVG(T3.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA) DESC

question: States ko rank karo unke average monthly per capita consumption ke basis par, sirf un households ke liye jo poverty line se upar hain.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE, AVG(T3.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T3.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No' GROUP BY T1.STATE ORDER BY AVG(T3.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA) DESC

question: States ko unke average monthly per capita consumption ke hisaab se rank karo, lekin sirf un households ke liye jo poverty line se upar hain.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE, AVG(T3.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T3.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No' GROUP BY T1.STATE ORDER BY AVG(T3.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA) DESC

question: Top 10 urban districts ko identify karo jo highest average monthly per capita consumption rakhte hain, aur unke respective poverty line thresholds bhi include karo.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT, AVG(T2.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA), T2.PER_CAPITA_POVERTY_LINE FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T2 ON T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT, T2.PER_CAPITA_POVERTY_LINE ORDER BY AVG(T2.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA) DESC LIMIT 10

question: Un districts ko pehchano jahan average monthly per capita consumption 500 se kam hai, lekin phir bhi poverty line se upar hain, aur un areas mein 0 se 14 saal tak ke bacchon ki kul sankhya batao.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT, SUM(T2.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T3.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No' GROUP BY T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT HAVING AVG(T3.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA) < 500

question: Jin districts mein jahan average monthly per capita consumption 500 se kam hai, unme state aur district ke hisaab se, poverty line se upar wale households mein rehne wale 0 se 14 saal ke bachchon ki total sankhya calculate karo.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT, SUM(T2.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T3.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No' GROUP BY T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT HAVING AVG(T3.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA) < 500

question: Rural districts aur unke states identify karo jahan average monthly per capita consumption 996 se kam hai, aur unhe total number of children aged 0 to 14 ke basis pe rank karo jo households mein rehte hain.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT, SUM(T2.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT HAVING AVG(T3.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA) < 996 ORDER BY SUM(T2.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT) DESC

question: Un districts ko identify karo jismein rural households poverty line se upar rehte hain, lekin koi bhi urban households poverty line se upar nahi hain.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' AND T3.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban' AND T3.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0

question: Batao wo rural districts jahan poverty line se upar rehne wale households hain, lekin urban districts ko chhod dena chahe unme bhi poverty line se upar ke households ho.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' AND T3.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT HAVING COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) > 0 EXCEPT SELECT T1.DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban' AND T3.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No';

question: Konsi states mein aise rural households hain jahan 15 se 21 saal ke residents ki sankhya, 15 saal se kam bachchon ki sankhya se zyada hai?
sql: SELECT T1.STATE FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T2.HOUSEHOLD_YOUTH_15_TO_21_COUNT > T2.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT AND T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.STATE

question: States ko alphabet ke order mein list karo, jahan rural households mein 15 se 21 saal ke residents ki sankhya, 15 saal se kam bachchon se zyada ho.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T2.HOUSEHOLD_YOUTH_15_TO_21_COUNT > T2.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT AND T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.STATE ORDER BY T1.STATE ASC

question: Sabhi states ko identify karo jisme ek household hai jisme 15 se 21 ke youth ka number 14 ke neech ke children se zyada hai, aur ek household poverty line ke neech jee raha hai.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN T2.HOUSEHOLD_YOUTH_15_TO_21_COUNT > T2.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN T3.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA < T3.PER_CAPITA_POVERTY_LINE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 ORDER BY T1.STATE ASC

question: Sabhi districts ko identify karo jismein aise households hain jinmein ya toh 15 saal se kam umar ke 5 se zyada bacche hain, ya phir jo poverty line se upar rehte hain.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T2.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT > 5 OR T3.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No';

question: Woh districts pata karo jismein ya toh aise households hain jinme 15 saal se kam umar ke 5 se zyada bacche hain, ya phir woh households hain jo poverty line se upar reh rahe hain.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T2.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT > 5 OR T3.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT

question: Batao un logon ki umar, gender, aur employment status jo aise households mein rehte hain jahan aath se zyada members hain.
sql: SELECT T1.PERSON_AGE_YEARS, T1.PERSON_GENDER, T1.WORKED_ANY_JOB_INDICATOR FROM FACT_PERSON_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T2.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT > 8

question: Individuals ka age, gender, aur employment status do jo aise households mein rehte hain jahan 8 se zyada members hain, youngest se oldest ke order mein.
sql: SELECT T2.PERSON_AGE_YEARS, T2.PERSON_GENDER, T2.WORKED_ANY_JOB_INDICATOR FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T1 JOIN FACT_PERSON_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T1.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT > 8 ORDER BY T2.PERSON_AGE_YEARS

question: Bade parivaar mein rehne waale vyaktiyon ki umar, gender, aur employment status batao, jahan parivaar mein aath se zyada members hon. Unhein sabse badi umar se lekar sabse chhoti umar tak ke kram mein lao.
sql: SELECT T1.PERSON_AGE_YEARS, T1.PERSON_GENDER, T1.WORKED_ANY_JOB_INDICATOR FROM FACT_PERSON_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T2.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT > 8 GROUP BY T1.PERSON_AGE_YEARS, T1.PERSON_GENDER, T1.WORKED_ANY_JOB_INDICATOR HAVING COUNT(T1.PERSON_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.PERSON_AGE_YEARS DESC

question: Jin logon ke liye jinhone koi job ki hai, unka average education ke saal aur total logon ki ginti batao, gender ke hisaab se.
sql: SELECT T1.PERSON_GENDER, AVG(T2.EDUCATION_YEARS_COMPLETED), COUNT(T1.PERSON_ID) FROM FACT_PERSON_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN FACT_PERSON_EDUCATION AS T2 ON T1.PERSON_ID = T2.PERSON_ID WHERE T1.WORKED_ANY_JOB_INDICATOR = '1' GROUP BY T1.PERSON_GENDER

question: Jin logon ke liye jo ek job kar chuke hain, unka average education ke saal aur total logon ki ginti gender ke hisaab se batao.
sql: SELECT T1.PERSON_GENDER, AVG(T2.EDUCATION_YEARS_COMPLETED), COUNT(T1.PERSON_ID) FROM FACT_PERSON_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN FACT_PERSON_EDUCATION AS T2 ON T1.PERSON_ID = T2.PERSON_ID WHERE T1.WORKED_ANY_JOB_INDICATOR = '1' GROUP BY T1.PERSON_GENDER

question: Gender ke hisaab se, employed persons ke liye average years of education completed aur total number of individuals ka breakdown do, highest se lowest average education level ke order mein.
sql: SELECT T1.PERSON_GENDER, AVG(T2.EDUCATION_YEARS_COMPLETED), COUNT(T1.PERSON_ID) FROM FACT_PERSON_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 INNER JOIN FACT_PERSON_EDUCATION AS T2 ON T1.PERSON_ID = T2.PERSON_ID INNER JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T3 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T1.WORKED_ANY_JOB_INDICATOR = 1 GROUP BY T1.PERSON_GENDER HAVING COUNT(T1.PERSON_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY AVG(T2.EDUCATION_YEARS_COMPLETED) DESC

question: Un logon ko pehchano jinhone das saal se zyada taleem haasil ki hai, lekin kabhi bhi koi naukri nahi ki hai.
sql: SELECT T1.PERSON_ID FROM FACT_PERSON_EDUCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_PERSON_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T2 ON T1.PERSON_ID = T2.PERSON_ID WHERE T1.EDUCATION_YEARS_COMPLETED > 10 AND T2.NUMBER_OF_JOBS_HELD = 0

question: Un logon ke IDs pata karo jinhone das saal se zyada ki taleem poori ki hai, lekin kabhi job nahi ki hai.
sql: SELECT T1.PERSON_ID FROM FACT_PERSON_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN FACT_PERSON_EDUCATION AS T2 ON T1.PERSON_ID = T2.PERSON_ID WHERE T2.EDUCATION_YEARS_COMPLETED > 10 AND T1.NUMBER_OF_JOBS_HELD = 0

question: Households ko unke members ke average education ke saal ke hisaab se rank karo, highest se lowest tak.
sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, AVG(T2.EDUCATION_YEARS_COMPLETED) FROM FACT_PERSON_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN FACT_PERSON_EDUCATION AS T2 ON T1.PERSON_ID = T2.PERSON_ID GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID ORDER BY AVG(T2.EDUCATION_YEARS_COMPLETED) DESC

question: Households ko rank karo unke adult members (21 saal aur usse bade) ke average education years ke basis par.
sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, AVG(T2.EDUCATION_YEARS_COMPLETED) FROM FACT_PERSON_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN FACT_PERSON_EDUCATION AS T2 ON T1.PERSON_ID = T2.PERSON_ID WHERE T1.PERSON_AGE_YEARS >= 21 GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID ORDER BY AVG(T2.EDUCATION_YEARS_COMPLETED) DESC

question: Top 10 households dhundho jisme 15 se 21 saal ke sabse zyada youth hain, aur unke income source ki details bhi batao.
sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, SUM(T1.HOUSEHOLD_YOUTH_15_TO_21_COUNT) FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_INCOME_SOURCES AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID ORDER BY SUM(T1.HOUSEHOLD_YOUTH_15_TO_21_COUNT) DESC LIMIT 10

question: Top 10 households ko identify karo jo 15 se 21 age ke sabse zyada residents hain, unka total youth count bhi include karo, available income aur poverty data ke basis par.
sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, SUM(T1.HOUSEHOLD_YOUTH_15_TO_21_COUNT) FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_INCOME_SOURCES AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T3 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID HAVING SUM(T1.HOUSEHOLD_YOUTH_15_TO_21_COUNT) > 0 ORDER BY SUM(T1.HOUSEHOLD_YOUTH_15_TO_21_COUNT) DESC LIMIT 10

question: Jo log abhi naukri kar rahe hain, unke liye ghar ke mukhiya ke saath unke rishte ke hisaab se, average padhai ke saal aur unki padhne-likhne ki haalat dikhao.
sql: SELECT T1.PERSON_RELATIONSHIP_TO_HOUSEHOLD_HEAD, AVG(T2.EDUCATION_YEARS_COMPLETED), T2.EDUCATION_LITERACY_STATUS FROM FACT_PERSON_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN FACT_PERSON_EDUCATION AS T2 ON T1.PERSON_ID = T2.PERSON_ID WHERE T1.WORKED_ANY_JOB_INDICATOR = '1' GROUP BY T1.PERSON_RELATIONSHIP_TO_HOUSEHOLD_HEAD, T2.EDUCATION_LITERACY_STATUS

question: Jo log abhi naukri mein hain, unke liye average education ke saal aur literacy status dikhao, household head se unke rishte ke hisaab se group karke, aur highest se lowest education level ke order mein rank karo.
sql: SELECT T1.PERSON_RELATIONSHIP_TO_HOUSEHOLD_HEAD, AVG(T2.EDUCATION_YEARS_COMPLETED), T2.EDUCATION_LITERACY_STATUS FROM FACT_PERSON_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN FACT_PERSON_EDUCATION AS T2 ON T1.PERSON_ID = T2.PERSON_ID WHERE T1.WORKED_ANY_JOB_INDICATOR = '1' GROUP BY T1.PERSON_RELATIONSHIP_TO_HOUSEHOLD_HEAD, T2.EDUCATION_LITERACY_STATUS ORDER BY AVG(T2.EDUCATION_YEARS_COMPLETED) DESC

question: Un logon ke IDs pata karo jinhone das saal se zyada padhai ki hai lekin kabhi job nahi ki.
sql: SELECT T1.PERSON_ID FROM FACT_PERSON_EDUCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_PERSON_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T2 ON T1.PERSON_ID = T2.PERSON_ID WHERE T1.EDUCATION_YEARS_COMPLETED > 10 AND T2.NUMBER_OF_JOBS_HELD = 0 AND T2.WORKED_ANY_JOB_INDICATOR = 0

question: Un logon ke IDs pata karo jinhone das saal se zyada ki taleem poori ki hai, lekin kabhi job nahi ki hai.
sql: SELECT T1.PERSON_ID FROM FACT_PERSON_EDUCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_PERSON_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T2 ON T1.PERSON_ID = T2.PERSON_ID WHERE T1.EDUCATION_YEARS_COMPLETED > 10 AND T2.NUMBER_OF_JOBS_HELD = 0 AND T2.WORKED_ANY_JOB_INDICATOR = 0 GROUP BY T1.PERSON_ID ORDER BY T1.PERSON_ID

question: Unemployed logon ki IDs pata karo jinhone das saal se zyada education complete ki hai aur pichhle mein exactly ek job ki hai, unke ID ke hisaab se sort karte hue.
sql: SELECT T1.PERSON_ID FROM FACT_PERSON_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN FACT_PERSON_EDUCATION AS T2 ON T1.PERSON_ID = T2.PERSON_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T3 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T2.EDUCATION_YEARS_COMPLETED > 10 AND T1.WORKED_ANY_JOB_INDICATOR = 0 GROUP BY T1.PERSON_ID HAVING COUNT(T1.NUMBER_OF_JOBS_HELD) = 1 ORDER BY T1.PERSON_ID ASC

question: Sabhi logon ko dhundho jinhone 12 saal se zyada ki taleem poori ki hai aur kam se kam ek naukri ki hai.
sql: SELECT T1.PERSON_ID FROM FACT_PERSON_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN FACT_PERSON_EDUCATION AS T2 ON T1.PERSON_ID = T2.PERSON_ID WHERE T2.EDUCATION_YEARS_COMPLETED > 12 AND T1.NUMBER_OF_JOBS_HELD >= 1

question: Bade parivaar mein rehne waale logon ko dhoondo, jahan ghar ke saat se zyaada members hain, unka education kam se kam 15 saal ka ho, aur unhone kam se kam ek job ki ho. Inhe ghar ke size ke hisaab se arrange karo.
sql: SELECT T1.PERSON_ID FROM FACT_PERSON_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID JOIN FACT_PERSON_EDUCATION AS T3 ON T1.PERSON_ID = T3.PERSON_ID WHERE T2.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT > 6 GROUP BY T1.PERSON_ID, T2.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT HAVING SUM(T3.EDUCATION_YEARS_COMPLETED) >= 15 AND SUM(T1.NUMBER_OF_JOBS_HELD) >= 1 ORDER BY T2.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT DESC

question: Sabhi logon ko dhundho jinke paas family farm par kaam karne ka anubhav hai ya animal care mein experience hai.
sql: SELECT PERSON_ID FROM FACT_PERSON_DEMOGRAPHICS WHERE WORKED_ON_FAMILY_FARM_INDICATOR = 1 OR WORKED_IN_ANIMAL_CARE_INDICATOR = 1
